Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Navigation Protection Act (North Thames River, Middle Thames River and Thames River)
Identification.RunningHead: An Act to amend the Navigation Protection Act (North Thames River, Middle Thames River and Thames River)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Navigation Protection Act in order to add the North Thames River, the Middle Thames River and the Thames River to the navigable waters listed in the schedule to that Act.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: Part 2 of the schedule to the Navigation Protection Act is amended by adding after item 22 in the columns shown the following:

Provision.Text: Column 1: 芒聙聹North Thames River芒聙聺
Column 2: 芒聙聹43脗掳37芒聙虏09芒聙鲁 N, 81脗掳09芒聙虏38芒聙鲁 W芒聙聺
Column 3: 芒聙聹42脗掳58芒聙虏56芒聙鲁 N, 81脗掳15芒聙虏24芒聙鲁 W芒聙聺
Column 4: 芒聙聹From West of Monkton to the confluence with the Thames River芒聙聺

Section.Text: Part 2 of the schedule to the Act is amended by adding after item 23 in the columns shown the following:

Provision.Text: Column 1: 芒聙聹Middle Thames River芒聙聺
Column 2: 芒聙聹43脗掳08芒聙虏21芒聙鲁 N, 80脗掳53芒聙虏33芒聙鲁 W芒聙聺
Column 3: 芒聙聹42脗掳59芒聙虏47芒聙鲁 N, 80脗掳58芒聙虏21芒聙鲁 W芒聙聺
Column 4: 芒聙聹From Mud Creek to the confluence with the Thames River芒聙聺
Column 1: 芒聙聹Thames River芒聙聺
Column 2: 芒聙聹43脗掳11芒聙虏17芒聙鲁 N, 80脗掳41芒聙虏53芒聙鲁 W芒聙聺
Column 3: 芒聙聹42脗掳19芒聙虏04芒聙鲁 N, 82脗掳27芒聙虏24芒聙鲁 W芒聙聺
Column 4: 芒聙聹From South of Innerkip to Lake St. Clair芒聙聺
